description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult female pedestrian with a casual urban appearance. She is dressed in a sleeveless, fitted crop top and a pair of high-waisted, distressed jeans, paired with sturdy lace-up boots. Her arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and her posture is upright, suggesting a neutral, relaxed stance. The figure has a medium build and is proportioned realistically, with visible anatomical details such as fingers, facial features, and hair texture. Her hair is styled in a shoulder-length, layered cut with a side part. The overall look is modern and suitable for a contemporary city environment.
description: A casually dressed adult female pedestrian with a crop top, distressed jeans, boots, and shoulder-length layered hair, standing upright with arms extended. The figure is realistically proportioned and detailed for urban settings.
